# Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Testing

- [ ] I tested this manually, or explained why testing is not applicable.
- [ ] I updated docs if product behavior changed.

## Product Boundary Checklist

- [ ] This does not add clipboard or pasteboard reads.
- [ ] This does not add clipboard or pasteboard writes.
- [ ] This does not add clipboard monitoring.
- [ ] This does not add clipboard fallback behavior.
- [ ] This does not add accounts, billing, teams, sync, or sharing.
- [ ] This does not commit API keys, secrets, local config, or build outputs.

## Notes

Add any tradeoffs, follow-ups, or known limitations.
